sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19524" key="basagi/koros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βασαγίκορος</orth>, <sense id="n19524.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁ θᾶσσον συνουσιάζων</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:107" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">107</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
